summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ENDAYE Aimé data science portfolio. Frontend fully functional with all sections working correctly. Backend APIs operational on localhost but external URL deployment issue detected.

critical_bugs.issue: External URL https://endayeaime-portfolio-ea-2ql1.preview.emergentagent.com shows 'Preview Unavailable' instead of portfolio
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot access the portfolio via the public URL

design_issues.issue: Portfolio design is clean and professional with good contrast and spacing
design_issues.note: No significant design issues found - layout, typography and colors are well implemented

passed_tests: Hero section with correct name ENDAYE Aimé and title Data Scientist
Navigation functionality (À propos, Compétences, Projets, Contact)
About section with bio and educational background
Skills section with 6 categories (Langages & Outils, Machine Learning, Data Engineering, Visualisation, Applications Web, Méthodologies)
Projects section with 8 projects and category filtering
Contact section with all 4 contact methods (GitHub, LinkedIn, Email, Téléphone)
CTA buttons functionality (Voir mes projets, Me contacter)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix external URL deployment - the public URL shows 'Preview Unavailable' instead of the portfolio. This is a deployment/networking issue preventing user access to the application.
